title: Xtra Dense Uruguayan Mackerel Skillet
description: A malty and dense Uruguayan dish featuring mackerel, this skillet is perfect for a diabetic-friendly dinner option, inspired by the monsoon season
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Season the mackerel fillets with salt, black pepper, and air-fryer seasoning
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute
Add the mackerel fillets to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side
Transfer the mackerel fillets to the air fryer and cook for an additional 5 minutes
In a small bowl, whisk together the malt vinegar and dried oregano
Pour the malt vinegar mixture over the mackerel fillets and serve hot
